title: Qdrant payload — archive_images
description: Multimodal image-embedding index of digital_object images. One point per image; vector is a 768-dim nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 image embedding. Hosted at http://localhost:6333/collections/archive_images. Issue #23, repointed to nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 in #1272. Point id = digital_object.id.

database.description: Source MySQL database for the parent IO.

object_id.description: information_object.id of the IO that owns this image. Discovery uses this to project image hits back to IO results.

title.description: Title of the parent IO (denormalised so image-only retrieval can render a label without a DB lookup).

slug.description: Public URL slug of the parent IO.

mime_type.description: Mime type of the source thumbnail; lets the UI decide how to render.

x-collection.name: archive_images

embed_contract.request: POST {embed_url}/embed/image  body { "model": "nomic-embed-vision-v1.5", "image": "<base64-bytes>" }  header Authorization: Bearer <ahg_live key>
embed_contract.notes: Routed through the AHG AI gateway (ai.theahg.co.za/ai/v1), never a direct GPU node port. The gateway route (B) and the GPU service (C) honour this exact contract (#1272).

x-collection.notes: Repointed from 512-dim clip-vit-b-32 to 768-dim nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 in #1272. Population is via the ahg:qdrant-image-index command; --recreate sets 768/Cosine. Text-to-image query encoding is planned separately.
